mapper.select: SELECT t.contentId, t.contentName, t.contentTime, t.courseContext, t.instructionalVideo, t.videoExplain, -- 上一节ID：查询比当前ID小的最大ID，无则为null (SELECT MAX(contentId) FROM driving_content WHERE contentId < t.contentId) AS prevContentId, -- 下一节ID：查询比当前ID大的最小ID，无则为null (SELECT MIN(contentId) FROM driving_content WHERE contentId > t.contentId) AS nextContentId FROM driving_content t WHERE t.contentId = #{contentId}
